vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

base_predicate_sqls: ("customer_city" = 'rio de janeiro' OR (("customer_city" = 'belo horizonte' OR ("customer_city" = 'salvador' OR "customer_city" = 'guarulhos')) OR (("customer_city" = 'brasilia' OR "customer_city" = 'curitiba') OR ("customer_city" = 'campinas' OR "customer_city" = 'porto alegre'))))
("customer_city" IS NULL OR "customer_city" NOT IN ('sao paulo', 'rio de janeiro', 'belo horizonte', 'brasilia', 'curitiba', 'campinas', 'porto alegre', 'salvador', 'guarulhos'))
fragment_roles: rows where customer_city = sao paulo

rows where customer_city = rio de janeiro + rows where customer_city = belo horizonte + rows where customer_city = salvador + rows where customer_city = guarulhos + rows where customer_city = brasilia + rows where customer_city = curitiba + rows where customer_city = campinas + rows where customer_city = porto alegre
rows where customer_city is NULL or not in {'sao paulo', 'rio de janeiro', 'belo horizonte', 'brasilia', 'curitiba', 'campinas', 'porto alegre', 'salvador', 'guarulhos'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
customers.fragment_role_B: rows where customer_city = rio de janeiro + rows where customer_city = belo horizonte + rows where customer_city = salvador + rows where customer_city = guarulhos + rows where customer_city = brasilia + rows where customer_city = curitiba + rows where customer_city = campinas + rows where customer_city = porto alegre

base_predicate_sqls: (("geolocation_city" = 'rio de janeiro' OR ("geolocation_city" = 'são paulo' OR ("geolocation_city" = 'porto alegre' OR "geolocation_city" = 'salvador'))) OR ("geolocation_city" = 'belo horizonte' OR ("geolocation_city" = 'curitiba' OR ("geolocation_city" = 'guarulhos' OR "geolocation_city" = 'brasilia'))))
("geolocation_city" IS NULL OR "geolocation_city" NOT IN ('sao paulo', 'rio de janeiro', 'belo horizonte', 'são paulo', 'curitiba', 'porto alegre', 'salvador', 'guarulhos', 'brasilia'))
fragment_roles: rows where geolocation_city = sao paulo

rows where geolocation_city = rio de janeiro + rows where geolocation_city = são paulo + rows where geolocation_city = porto alegre + rows where geolocation_city = salvador + rows where geolocation_city = belo horizonte + rows where geolocation_city = curitiba + rows where geolocation_city = guarulhos + rows where geolocation_city = brasilia

rows where geolocation_city is NULL or not in {'sao paulo', 'rio de janeiro', 'belo horizonte', 'são paulo', 'curitiba', 'porto alegre', 'salvador', 'guarulhos', 'brasilia'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
geolocation.fragment_role_B: rows where geolocation_city = rio de janeiro + rows where geolocation_city = são paulo + rows where geolocation_city = porto alegre + rows where geolocation_city = salvador + rows where geolocation_city = belo horizonte + rows where geolocation_city = curitiba + rows where geolocation_city = guarulhos + rows where geolocation_city = brasilia

base_predicate_sqls: (("payment_installments" IS NOT NULL AND "payment_installments" > 1 AND "payment_installments" <= 1) OR ("payment_installments" IS NOT NULL AND "payment_installments" > 1 AND "payment_installments" <= 4))
fragment_roles: rows where payment_installments <= 1
rows where 1 < payment_installments <= 1 + rows where 1 < payment_installments <= 4
rows where payment_installments > 4 or is NULL
order_payments.fragment_role_B: rows where 1 < payment_installments <= 1 + rows where 1 < payment_installments <= 4

fragment_roles: rows where review_creation_date <= 2017-09-23 00:00:00
rows where review_creation_date > 2018-05-16 00:00:00 or is NULL
rows where price <= 39.9
rows where 39.9 < price <= 74.99
rows where 74.99 < price <= 134.9
rows where price > 134.9 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: (("seller_city" = 'curitiba' OR ("seller_city" = 'rio de janeiro' OR ("seller_city" = 'santo andre' OR "seller_city" = 'campinas'))) OR (("seller_city" = 'belo horizonte' OR "seller_city" = 'ribeirao preto') OR ("seller_city" = 'guarulhos' OR "seller_city" = 'ibitinga')))
("seller_city" IS NULL OR "seller_city" NOT IN ('sao paulo', 'curitiba', 'rio de janeiro', 'belo horizonte', 'ribeirao preto', 'guarulhos', 'ibitinga', 'santo andre', 'campinas'))
fragment_roles: rows where seller_city = sao paulo

rows where seller_city = curitiba + rows where seller_city = rio de janeiro + rows where seller_city = santo andre + rows where seller_city = campinas + rows where seller_city = belo horizonte + rows where seller_city = ribeirao preto + rows where seller_city = guarulhos + rows where seller_city = ibitinga
rows where seller_city is NULL or not in {'sao paulo', 'curitiba', 'rio de janeiro', 'belo horizonte', 'ribeirao preto', 'guarulhos', 'ibitinga', 'santo andre', 'campinas'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
sellers.fragment_role_B: rows where seller_city = curitiba + rows where seller_city = rio de janeiro + rows where seller_city = santo andre + rows where seller_city = campinas + rows where seller_city = belo horizonte + rows where seller_city = ribeirao preto + rows where seller_city = guarulhos + rows where seller_city = ibitinga

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.
Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.
Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
